json_data.title: Computer Architecture
json_data.reason: It provides the essential understanding of the underlying hardware components that an operating system manages and interacts with.

json_data.title: Distributed Systems
json_data.reason: It extends fundamental operating system concepts like resource management, concurrency, and fault tolerance to a network of interconnected machines.

json_data.title: Formal Verification of Operating Systems
json_data.reason: This research-level topic involves applying rigorous mathematical methods to prove the correctness and security properties of operating system kernels.
